data.content:
This is an MSTest project using VSTest. Use the `--filter` option with `TestCategory`:

```
dotnet test --filter "TestCategory=Integration"
```

This will run only the 3 tests decorated with `[TestCategory("Integration")]`: `CreateOrder_SavesInDatabase`, `CreateOrder_SendsNotification`, and `ProcessPayment_GatewayTimeout_Retries`.
